# Session 000 — Template (copy, do not edit in place)

> Copy this file to `YYYY-MM-DD-slug.md` (use `-N` if multiple sessions land in one day, e.g. `2026-06-28-rituals-2.md`) and fill in the sections below. Leave this template at `000-template.md` so the next agent sees the shape.

## Date and scope
YYYY-MM-DD — one sentence describing what this session is about.

## What changed
- Files created, files edited, ADRs added, CHANGELOG entries, STATUS updates.
- One bullet per material change. Link to commits or PRs where helpful.

## Decisions made
- Decision and its outcome. Link to the ADR if non-trivial (`docs/decisions/NNN-*.md`).

## `[VERIFY:]` surfaced
- Every `[VERIFY:]` emitted this session. Also rolled up to `STATUS.md` "Open `[VERIFY:]`".
- _(write "none" if truly none)_

## `[INFERRED:]` made
- Every `[INFERRED:]` emitted this session. Also rolled up to `STATUS.md` "Open `[INFERRED:]`".
- _(write "none" if truly none)_

## Anything you noticed?
Four honest answers, even when "no, all clear":

1. Anything surprising about the codebase or task?
2. Anything that should change in `AGENTS.md` or `STATUS.md`?
3. Any `[VERIFY:]` or `[INFERRED:]` markers still unresolved?
4. Anything the next session should not have to relearn?
